blocks.title: Company Overview
blocks.content:
Charité Berlin is Europe's largest university hospital with over **3,000 beds** and a strong academic research profile. The hospital has shown significant interest in AI-powered diagnostics, particularly in radiology and pathology.

Key fact: Charité was ranked the **#1 hospital in Europe** by Newsweek in 2024.

events.text: Scout identified Dr. Weber via conference attendance
Email 2 opened — clicked ROI calculator link
Email 3 opened — downloaded radiology case study
Dr. Weber called in — qualified as high-intent

blocks.title: Talking Points
items: Ask about current radiology AI tools and pain points
Emphasize **GDPR compliance** and EU data residency
Propose 3-month pilot with radiology department (20 workstations)
Reference Newsweek ranking — show we know their institution
Do NOT mention pricing before he asks

blocks.title: Competitive Advantage
blocks.content: No competitor currently offers on-premise deployment with EU data residency certification. This is our strongest differentiator for German hospital systems.

blocks.text: Generated by AI Agent — Lead Scout + Analyst · Data as of Feb 17, 2026
